parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.events (
  src_title,
  src_url,
  src_source,
  src_lang,
  src_published_at,
  event_date,
  short_summary,
  lat,
  lon,
  is_oil_black_sea,
  llm_extract,
  hash
)
VALUES (
  '{{ ($json.src_title || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.src_url || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  'manual',
  'uk',
  NOW(),
  ({{ $json.event_date ? "'" + $json.event_date + "'" : 'NULL' }})::date,
  NULLIF('{{ ($json.short_summary || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',''),
  {{ $json.lat ? $json.lat : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.lon ? $json.lon : 'NULL' }},
  true,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'manual', true,
    'notes', NULLIF('{{ ($json.notes || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}','')
  ),
  public.compute_event_hash(
    '{{ ($json.src_url   || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 
    '{{ ($json.src_title || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 
    NOW() -- TIMESTAMPTZ, ОК 
  )
)
ON CONFLICT (hash) DO UPDATE
SET
  short_summary = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.short_summary, public.events.short_summary),
  lat           = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.lat, public.events.lat),
  lon           = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.lon, public.events.lon),
  llm_extract   = public.events.llm_extract || EXCLUDED.llm_extract
RETURNING
  id,
  src_title,
  src_url,
  src_published_at,
  event_date,
  short_summary,
  lat,
  lon;
